name: Marks of Ki
short_description: Marks of Ki is an adventure-RPG game featuring intense, souls-like combat, developed single-handedly by one passionate guy. Players can choose from six unique customizable characters, each offering distinct abilities and fighting styles.
detailed_description:
Marks of Ki is an open world action game with souls-like combat, passionately made by a solo developer. Enter the mystical world of Aiona, where warriors from all walks of life strive to master an immense power named Ki. Unleash your inner Ki, choose your character, and prepare for the ultimate battle.

Enhanced Combat.

Attack, block, dodge, dash, roll, or parry! Choose from 6 diverse characters, each wielding their own unique abilities, ultimates and fighting styles. With a character customization system and a vast array of Marks to collect, players have the freedom to shape their combat experience. Each Mark empowers a different attribute, even some reduce it! Choose your build carefully and begin this journey against the dark forces of a man named Apollo.

Defeat Bosses

Prepare for 10+ heart-pounding Boss battles that demand every ounce of your skill and ingenuity. Explore the vast landscapes of Aiona, uncover hidden secrets, and adapt your approach to overcome seemingly insurmountable odds. In Marks of Ki, triumph is never guaranteed—only earned through perseverance and strategic mastery.
